// Add inside MauiProgram.CreateMauiApp(), in the "Registrar serviços" block,
// after the existing IFormService registration line:

builder.Services.AddSingleton<ICategoryService, CategoryService>();


// Context — existing block for reference:
//
//     builder.Services.AddSingleton<IFormService, FormService>();
//     builder.Services.AddSingleton<ICategoryService, CategoryService>();   // <-- add here
//
// AddSingleton is correct because CategoryService is stateless (holds no per-request state).
// The shared HttpClient (already registered as singleton) is injected via constructor.
